verbGlossary.EVALUATED DURING: {source}document undergoes scoring, comparison, or qualification assessment during this review {target}.
verbGlossary.QUALIFIES UPON: The vendor or contractor achieves qualified {target} when this approval is granted.
verbGlossary.ASSEMBLED IN: {source} or contract document is compiled and organized while in this draft {target}.
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED VIA: {source} is sent to prospective bidders or respondents through this distribution {target}.
verbGlossary.SOLICITS AT: {source}is opened and made available to bidders at {target}.
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED AT: {source}document or instrument is formally submitted for consideration at {target}.
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source} automatically transitions to {target} when deadlines are missed.
verbGlossary.LEVELED VIA: {source}are normalized and compared on equal terms using this parallel review pattern.
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED VIA: {source} is routed to a responsible party through {target}.
verbGlossary.EXECUTED UPON: {source} becomes a binding contractual commitment when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES VIA: {source} obtains formal certification or authentication through {target}.
verbGlossary.VOIDED TO: {source} is canceled and moved to void {target}, removing it from active contractual tracking.
verbGlossary.ROUTES THROUGH: {source} passes through {target} pattern or approval chain as part of its lifecycle processing.
verbGlossary.FOLLOWS: {source} adheres to this standard {target} pattern from initiation through completion.
verbGlossary.COUNTERSIGNED VIA: {source}receives the required counter-party signature through this e-signature {target}.
verbGlossary.NEGOTIATED VIA: {source} terms are discussed and modified through this review-and-respond {target} pattern.
verbGlossary.LOCKED UPON: {source}document's terms become read-only once {target} is reached, preventing further edits.
verbGlossary.WITHHELD DURING: {source} funds are held back from payment while {target} remains in this held status.
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} are activated when the project reaches this overdue or delinquent {target}.
verbGlossary.CONSUMED DURING: {source} or contingency funds are drawn down against actual costs during this financial stage.
verbGlossary.FURNISHED AT: The bond, certificate, or compliance document is provided by the contractor at this submission {target}.
verbGlossary.RELEASED AT: {source}are disbursed when the project or instrument reaches this terminal {target}.
verbGlossary.ISSUED UPON: {source} is formally released or sent to recipients when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.VERIFIED UPON: {source}document is confirmed as valid and current when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.BOUND UPON: The insurance policy becomes effective and binds coverage to the project when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source} is constrained by {target} component, such as a contractual due date or deadline.
verbGlossary.INSPECTED AT: {source}is physically reviewed and assessed for completeness at this ready-for-review {target}.
verbGlossary.REJECTED AT: {source}is denied due to outstanding deficiencies found at this disposition {target}.
verbGlossary.FINALIZES AT: The contract reaches its terminal {target}, completing all obligations and closing the record.
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED UPON: The milestone, completion, or compliance document is formally certified at {target}.
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} is monitored over time using {target} KPI.
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AGAINST: {source}rate is compared against {target} efficiency metric to assess performance.
verbGlossary.CORRELATED WITH: {source} is analyzed in relation to {target} measure to identify trends.
